columns.name: AgentId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the CrowdStrike agent that generated the alert.

columns.name: AggregateId
columns.description: Identifier for aggregated alerts from the same source.

columns.name: AlertType
columns.description: The type or category of the CrowdStrike alert.

columns.name: AllegedFiletype
columns.description: The suspected file type of the malicious file associated with the alert.

columns.name: AssignedToName
columns.description: Name of the user assigned to handle the alert.

columns.name: AssignedToUid
columns.description: User ID of the assigned user.

columns.name: AssignedToUuid
columns.description: UUID of the assigned user.

columns.name: _BilledSize
columns.description: The record size in bytes

columns.name: Categorization
columns.description: Categorization of the alert.

columns.name: ChildProcessIds
columns.description: List of child process IDs spawned by the detected process.

columns.name: Cid
columns.description: Customer ID in the CrowdStrike platform.

columns.name: CloudIndicator
columns.description: Indicates if the alert involves cloud-based indicators.

columns.name: Cmdline
columns.description: Command line used to execute the detected process.

columns.name: CompositeId
columns.description: Composite identifier combining multiple alert attributes.

columns.name: Confidence
columns.description: Confidence score of the alert (0-100).

columns.name: ContextTimestamp
columns.description: Timestamp providing additional context for the alert.

columns.name: CorrelationRuleCreateCase
columns.description: Indicates if the correlation rule is configured to create a case.

columns.name: CorrelationRuleExecutionId
columns.description: Execution ID of the correlation rule that triggered the alert.

columns.name: CorrelationRuleId
columns.description: Identifier of the correlation rule that triggered the alert.

columns.name: CorrelationRuleUserId
columns.description: User ID associated with the correlation rule.

columns.name: CorrelationRuleUserUuid
columns.description: UUID of the user associated with the correlation rule.

columns.name: CrawledTimestamp
columns.description: Timestamp when the alert data was last crawled.

columns.name: CreatedTimestamp
columns.description: Timestamp when the alert was first created.

columns.name: DataDomains
columns.description: Domains associated with the alert.

columns.name: Description
columns.description: Detailed description of the alert.

columns.name: DetectionId
columns.description: Unique identifier for the detection associated with the alert.

columns.name: Device
columns.description: Information about the device where the alert was detected.

columns.name: DisplayName
columns.description: Human-readable name for the alert.

columns.name: EmailSent
columns.description: Indicates if an email notification was sent for this alert.

columns.name: EndTime
columns.description: Timestamp when the alert activity ended.

columns.name: EnrichedEntities
columns.description: Enriched entity information associated with the alert.

columns.name: EventCorrelationId
columns.description: Correlation ID linking related events.

columns.name: EventIds
columns.description: Event IDs associated with the alert.

columns.name: External
columns.description: Indicates if the alert originated from an external source.

columns.name: FalconHostLink
columns.description: Link to the alert details in the CrowdStrike Falcon console.

columns.name: Filename
columns.description: Name of the file associated with the alert.

columns.name: Filepath
columns.description: Full path to the file associated with the alert.

columns.name: GlobalPrevalence
columns.description: Global prevalence rating of the detected file.

columns.name: GrandparentDetails
columns.description: Details about the grandparent process in the process tree.

columns.name: HasTruncatedEntities
columns.description: Indicates if the alert entities have been truncated.

columns.name: Id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the alert.

columns.name: IndicatorId
columns.description: Identifier for the indicator of compromise that triggered the alert.

columns.name: IocContext
columns.description: Context information about the indicator of compromise.

columns.name: _IsBillable
columns.description: Specifies whether ingesting the data is billable. When _IsBillable isfalseingestion isn't billed to your Azure account

columns.name: IsClosed
columns.description: Indicates if the alert has been closed.

columns.name: LeadId
columns.description: Identifier for the lead associated with the alert.

columns.name: LeadType
columns.description: Type of the lead associated with the alert.

columns.name: LocalAddressIp4
columns.description: IPv4 address of the local endpoint.

columns.name: LocalAddressIp6
columns.description: IPv6 address of the local endpoint.

columns.name: LocalPrevalence
columns.description: Local prevalence rating within the organization.

columns.name: LocalProcessId
columns.description: Local process ID on the system where the alert occurred.

columns.name: LogonDomain
columns.description: Domain used for user logon associated with the alert.

columns.name: Md5
columns.description: MD5 hash of the file associated with the alert.

columns.name: MitreAttack
columns.description: MITRE ATT&CK tactics and techniques associated with the alert.

columns.name: Name
columns.description: Name of the alert.

columns.name: Objective
columns.description: The attacker's presumed objective.

columns.name: OriginalCorrelationRulesEntitiesCount
columns.description: Original count of correlation rule entities.

columns.name: OriginalIndicatorEntitiesCount
columns.description: Original count of indicator entities.

columns.name: OriginCid
columns.description: Customer ID of the originating tenant.

columns.name: ParentDetails
columns.description: Details about the parent process in the process tree.

columns.name: ParentProcessId
columns.description: Process ID of the parent process.

columns.name: PatternDisposition
columns.description: Numerical identifier for the action taken by the detection pattern.

columns.name: PatternDispositionDescription
columns.description: Text description of the pattern disposition action.

columns.name: PatternDispositionDetails
columns.description: Detailed information about the pattern disposition.

columns.name: PatternId
columns.description: Identifier for the detection pattern that triggered the alert.

columns.name: Platform
columns.description: Operating system or platform where the alert was detected.

columns.name: PolyId
columns.description: Poly ID associated with the alert.

columns.name: PriorityDetails
columns.description: Priority details associated with the alert.

columns.name: ProcessEndTime
columns.description: Timestamp when the detected process ended.

columns.name: ProcessId
columns.description: Process ID of the detected process.

columns.name: ProcessStartTime
columns.description: Timestamp when the detected process started.

columns.name: Product
columns.description: CrowdStrike product that generated the alert.

columns.name: Scenario
columns.description: Security scenario that triggered the alert.

columns.name: Score
columns.description: Score associated with the alert.

columns.name: SecondsToResolved
columns.description: Time in seconds from alert creation to resolution.

columns.name: SecondsToTriaged
columns.description: Time in seconds from alert creation to triage.

columns.name: Severity
columns.description: Severity level of the alert.

columns.name: SeverityName
columns.description: Text representation of the severity level.

columns.name: Sha1
columns.description: SHA1 hash of the file associated with the alert.

columns.name: Sha256
columns.description: SHA256 hash of the file associated with the alert.

columns.name: ShowInUi
columns.description: Indicates if the alert should be displayed in the user interface.

columns.name: SignalEndTimestamp
columns.description: Timestamp when the signal ended.

columns.name: SignalStartTimestamp
columns.description: Timestamp when the signal started.

columns.name: SignalUpdatedTimestamp
columns.description: Timestamp when the signal was last updated.

columns.name: SourceEndpointAddressIp4
columns.description: IPv4 address of the source endpoint.

columns.name: SourceEndpointAddressIp6
columns.description: IPv6 address of the source endpoint.

columns.name: SourceIps
columns.description: List of source IP addresses associated with the alert.

columns.name: SourceProducts
columns.description: List of products that contributed to this alert.

columns.name: SourceSystem
columns.description: The type of agent the event was collected by. For example,OpsManagerfor Windows agent, either direct connect or Operations Manager,Linuxfor all Linux agents, orAzurefor Azure Diagnostics

columns.name: SourceVendors
columns.description: List of vendors associated with the alert sources.

columns.name: StartTime
columns.description: Timestamp when the alert activity started.

columns.name: Status
columns.description: Current status of the alert.

columns.name: Tactic
columns.description: MITRE ATT&CK tactic associated with the alert.

columns.name: TacticId
columns.description: Identifier of the MITRE ATT&CK tactic.

columns.name: Tags
columns.description: Custom tags associated with the alert.

columns.name: Technique
columns.description: MITRE ATT&CK technique associated with the alert.

columns.name: TechniqueId
columns.description: Identifier of the MITRE ATT&CK technique.

columns.name: TemplateInstanceId
columns.description: Instance ID of the detection template used.

columns.name: TenantId
columns.description: The Log Analytics workspace ID

columns.name: ThreatgraphIndicators
columns.description: Threat graph indicators associated with the alert.

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: The timestamp (UTC) when the alert was generated.

columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description: Time when the alert event occurred.

columns.name: TriggeringProcessGraphId
columns.description: Graph ID of the process that triggered the alert.

columns.name: Type
columns.description: The name of the table

columns.name: UpdatedTimestamp
columns.description: Time when the alert was last updated.

columns.name: UserId
columns.description: User ID associated with the alert.

columns.name: UserName
columns.description: Username associated with the alert.

columns.name: Users
columns.description: List of users associated with the alert.

columns.name: VendorPatternId
columns.description: Vendor-specific pattern identifier.

columns.name: XdrEventId
columns.description: XDR event ID associated with the alert.
